content.text: Yesterday, @Firefox telemetry shows that more than 60% of all page loads were over HTTPS! 🔒 🎉 https://ipv.sx/telemetry/general-v2.html?channels=release&measure=HTTP_PAGELOAD_IS_SSL&target=1&absolute=0&relative=1
